name: Removedores de óxido para instrumental
base_unit: unidad (1 envase: frasco, pote o bidon)
curation_log: DRAFT generated by the LLM strawman (design §3 step 5) from real corpus samples — cheap and disposable, never authoritative. Requires the full M1 procedure (mining passes, price-discrimination test, expert curation, reference validation) before launch.
Dry run on 50 corpus samples: coverage {'forma': 0.52, 'capacidad': 0.6}, illegal extractions 0.
Fix-D part2: numeric domains regenerated — canonicalized to one unit, leading zeros normalized, corpus-observed values (>=25) added.

attribute_defs.name: forma
attribute_defs.curation_notes: identity: la presentacion fisica (polvo, liquido, crema) distingue productos distintos del rubro; el polvo viene en frascos de gramos y el liquido en bidones/litros.

attribute_defs.name: capacidad
attribute_defs.curation_notes: identity: el contenido del envase (gramos para polvo, litros para liquido) discrimina presentaciones; unit vacio porque convive masa y volumen segun la forma.
